title: Indobanalia thyrsiflora
taxonomy: Indobanalia thyrsiflora is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. It is native to Indonesia, where it is found in tropical rainforests. The plant is a shrub or vine that grows in a variety of habitats, from lowland forests to mountainous regions. Members of the Melastomataceae family are often known as the "membrane flowers" due to the unique structure of their flowers. Further research is needed to confirm the specific classification of Indobanalia thyrsiflora within the Melastomataceae family.
